name: zhc-workforce-org-chart
description: HTML + Playwright renderer for the workforce-structure infographic shipped by Skill 37 (ZHC Closeout). Produces a deterministic 1920x1080 PNG with perfect text labels.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log('[zhc-org-chart] If Chromium is not installed yet, run: npx playwright install chromium')"
